app_settings._comment: General app behavior and appearance settings loaded on startup
app_settings._comment_default_theme: App color theme on first launch. Values: 'light' or 'dark'
app_settings._comment_content_source: Where to fetch video/audio content from. Values: 'server' or 'newpipeextractor'
app_settings._comment_server_url: Base URL of your backend API. Used only when content_source is 'server'
app_settings._comment_content_images: Where to load thumbnails and cover images from. Values: 'server' or 'newpipeextractor'

show_download_button._comment: Controls visibility of the download button on each screen

app_settings._comment_player_notification: Show a media player controller in the notification bar while playing
app_settings._comment_search_result_count: Number of results returned per search query. Recommended: 10 to 50

admob._comment: Google AdMob configuration. Set status to false to disable all Google AdMob ads globally
admob._comment_status: Master switch for this network. true = Active, false = Inactive
admob.title: AdMob
admob._comment_title: Display name for this ad network
admob._comment_publisher_id: Your Publisher ID from the ad network dashboard

banner._comment: Banner ad displayed on selected screens
banner._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the banner
banner._comment_screens: List of screens where the banner appears

interstitial._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the interstitial
interstitial._comment_clicks_before_show: Clicks required before the interstitial is triggered
interstitial._comment_screens: List of screens where the interstitial is allowed

native._comment: Native ad blended into the content list
native._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the native ad
native._comment_position: Position index in the list (e.g. 6 = after 6th item)

open_ad._comment: App Open ad shown on launch or resume
open_ad._comment_enabled: Turn App Open ad on or off
open_ad._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the App Open ad

reward_video._comment: Rewarded video — user watches in exchange for reward
reward_video._comment_enabled: Turn reward video on or off
reward_video._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the rewarded video

facebook_ads._comment: Meta (Facebook) Audience Network configuration. Set status to false to disable all Meta (Facebook) Audience Network ads globally
facebook_ads._comment_status: Master switch for this network. true = Active, false = Inactive
facebook_ads.title: Facebook Audience Network
facebook_ads._comment_title: Display name for this ad network
facebook_ads._comment_publisher_id: Your Publisher ID from the ad network dashboard

banner._comment: Banner ad displayed on selected screens
banner._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the banner
banner._comment_screens: List of screens where the banner appears

interstitial._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the interstitial
interstitial._comment_clicks_before_show: Clicks required before the interstitial is triggered
interstitial._comment_screens: List of screens where the interstitial is allowed

native._comment: Native ad blended into the content list
native._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the native ad
native._comment_position: Position index in the list (e.g. 6 = after 6th item)

open_ad._comment: App Open ad shown on launch or resume
open_ad._comment_enabled: Turn App Open ad on or off
open_ad._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the App Open ad

reward_video._comment: Rewarded video — user watches in exchange for reward
reward_video._comment_enabled: Turn reward video on or off
reward_video._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the rewarded video

unity_ads._comment: Unity Ads configuration. Set status to false to disable all Unity Ads ads globally
unity_ads._comment_status: Master switch for this network. true = Active, false = Inactive
unity_ads._comment_game_id: Your Unity Project Game ID from the Unity Dashboard

banner._comment: Banner ad displayed on selected screens
banner._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the banner
banner._comment_screens: List of screens where the banner appears

interstitial._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the interstitial
interstitial._comment_clicks_before_show: Clicks required before the interstitial is triggered
interstitial._comment_screens: List of screens where the interstitial is allowed

reward_video._comment: Rewarded video — user watches in exchange for reward
reward_video._comment_enabled: Turn reward video on or off
reward_video._comment_ad_id: Unique Ad Unit ID for the rewarded video

app_update_popup._comment: Popup shown when a new version of the app is available
app_update_popup._comment_enabled: Show or hide the update popup
app_update_popup._comment_new_version: Latest version of the app. Compare against current to trigger popup
app_update_popup.description: We have fixed bugs and improved performance. Update now for the best experience!
app_update_popup._comment_description: Message shown inside the update popup
app_update_popup._comment_update_link: URL that opens when user taps update (usually Play Store link)
app_update_popup._comment_cancel_option: true = optional update (show Cancel), false = forced update

app_review_popup._comment: Popup shown to encourage users to rate the app
app_review_popup._comment_enabled: Show or hide the review popup
app_review_popup.description: Enjoying the app? Please take a moment to rate us on the Play Store!
app_review_popup._comment_description: Message shown inside the review popup
app_review_popup._comment_review_link: URL that opens when user taps rate (usually Play Store link)
app_review_popup._comment_open_app_count: Number of app opens before the popup is shown
